description: Iteration / convergence rules and search-budget caps. Loop 15 (iterative-refinement) reads this between every refinement pass and stops when criteria are met OR max_passes is hit.

conditional_loops.12: Run Loop 12 (adversarial) ONLY if Loop 11's recompute crosses a conviction-tier boundary or flips direction vs the prior canonical. Inserted between Loop 11 and Loop 16 when triggered. Otherwise skipped to keep delta runs fast.

search_budget._note_loop_15: loop_15 is the iteration controller; it runs 0 searches of its own. The budget it appears to consume in metrics.json (e.g. 489) is the SUM of the re-dispatched Loops 11-14 across passes 2..N. Per-pass sub-loop spend draws from each sub-loop's own per_loop budget. The per_cycle_total_cap below bounds the whole cycle including all iteration passes.
